revision.comment: new key for [[Category:14th-century religious buildings and structures]]: " +Buddhist temples" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]

This category is about Buddhist temples built in the 14th century. {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:14th-century Buddhism|Temp]] [[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 14]] [[Category:14th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]]
